# WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error

**Structure**

Constants that indicate errors in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/MatchPattern] domain.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Error
```

## Type Properties

- **errorDomain**
- **invalidHost**: Indicates that the host component was invalid.
- **invalidPath**: Indicates that the path component was invalid.
- **invalidScheme**: Indicates that the scheme component was invalid.
- **unknown**: Indicates that an unknown error occurred.

## Errors

- **WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error.Code**: Constants that indicate errors in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/MatchPattern] domain.
- **errorDomain**: A string that identifies the error domain.

## Conforms To

- CustomNSError
- Equatable
- Error
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
